description: Exhaustive deviation decisions: every canonical hand × upcard × true count [-10,+12] × rule set × DAS × LS → expected action (incl. insurance overlay and surrender precedence). Columnar: each row follows `columns`; matchedRuleSourceIndex indexes `sources` (-1 = none). Suits are arbitrary.
